title: Indian Mulligatawney
ingredients: 1 ½ cup pureed garbanzo beans (canned, drained)
instructions: Heat oil and butter in saucepan.
Add chopped vegetables, apples, salt, red pepper, and curry powder to the saucepan.
Cook, stirring frequently, until onions are almost tender.
Meanwhile, heat stock to boiling point.
Make a smooth paste of cornstarch and cold water.
Add cornstarch paste to boiling stock, stirring constantly, until stock returns to boil.
Add sauteed vegetables and remaining ingredients (tomato paste, chicken, and garbanzo beans) to the stock, except parsley.
notes: Use Granny Smith apples for the best flavor
Use canned, drained garbanzo beans and puree in food processor or blender
